_comment: Firestore auto-creates single-field indexes for every queried field. Most queries here are single-field (notification_tokens.where('leagueId'), audit.where('at'), games.where('status')). A compound query — `.where(...).orderBy(...)` on different fields, or two `.where(...)` filters — needs an explicit composite index or Firestore throws FAILED_PRECONDITION at runtime. Declare it below and run `firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes`. CURRENT ENTRIES: (1) pending_nav[auth_uid,leagueId] — audit M5: app/api/check-pending-nav does .where('auth_uid','==',uid).where('leagueId','==',leagueId); without this index that route 500s.
